# TraceContext.HasTraceparent method

Returns `true` when *meta* carries a W3C-conformant `traceparent`. Mirrors TS `hasTraceparent`. (R-15.4.1-a)

```csharp
public static bool HasTraceparent(JsonObject meta)
```

## Return Value
